---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new hook or a behavior change.
title: "[feat] "
labels: ["enhancement", "needs-triage"]
---

## Problem

What pain point does this address? (Bonus points for a real scenario.)

## Proposed solution

How should the hook behave? Sketch the config schema and the decision JSON if possible.

## Alternatives considered

What else did you consider, and why is this approach better?

## Willing to send a PR?

- [ ] Yes
- [ ] No, just discussing
- [ ] I'd like help
